theme: Stop calculating salary per year — calculate per hour of freedom
higgsfield_prompt: Cinematic extreme close-up of a calendar with most days crossed out in red except a few glowing white ones, camera slowly pulling back to reveal the calendar pinned to an office wall beside a large window overlooking a city, dramatic natural light, film grain, 4K quality
voiceover: Your company tells you your salary in years. That hides the real number. Divide it by two thousand working hours. Now look at how many of those hours you actually control. That gap between your hourly rate and the hours you own is the metric that matters. Close that gap.
caption:
Stop thinking about your salary in years.

Think in hours of freedom.

The real calculation:
$100K salary ÷ 2,000 hrs = $50/hr

Now ask: how many of those 2,000 hours do you actually control?

Meeting you didn't need: -1 hr
Commute: -2 hrs/day
Admin work an AI could do: -3 hrs/day

You're not selling $50/hr. You're selling way more — for far less than you think.

The goal: close the gap between your rate and your freedom hours.
